testcase.name: Story 23a admin analytics overview â€º admin sees overview metrics and can switch to reports tab
Story 23a admin analytics overview â€º non-admin still receives forbidden on /admin
Story 23 admin dashboard â€º non-admin user gets forbidden access to /admin
Story 23 admin dashboard â€º admin can dismiss, ban, remove and banned user gets clear create/comment rejection
Story 4 auth and onboarding UI â€º signup page keeps provider hierarchy and login link
Story 4 auth and onboarding UI â€º onboarding prompt can be dismissed
Story 11 comments â€º shows comments chronologically to visitors
Story 11 comments â€º adds and deletes own comment without page reload
Story 11 comments â€º guest interaction with comment input opens login prompt
Story 11 comments â€º rejects empty comment submission with validation message
Story 23d draft experience and later publish â€º draft stays private until explicit publish and then becomes visible everywhere
Story 14 edit profile & avatar upload â€º owner can access edit page with pre-populated fields
Story 14 edit profile & avatar upload â€º can edit display name and bio
Story 14 edit profile & avatar upload â€º username change redirects to new profile URL
Story 14 edit profile & avatar upload â€º duplicate username shows inline error
Story 14 edit profile & avatar upload â€º avatar upload updates avatar on profile
Story 14 edit profile & avatar upload â€º unauthenticated user is redirected to login
Story 14 edit profile & avatar upload â€º non-owner gets 403 on edit page
Story 16 explore feed filters â€º public visitors can browse explore and apply combinable filters with shareable URL
Story 16 explore feed filters â€º shows filtered empty state when no posts match
Story 16 explore feed filters â€º loads additional posts with cursor-based infinite scroll and shows loading skeleton
testcase.failure:
[chromium] â€º explore-feed-filters.spec.ts:145:7 â€º Story 16 explore feed filters â€º loads additional posts with cursor-based infinite scroll and shows loading skeleton
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByText('Loading more stories...') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText('Loading more stories...')
161 | }); 162 | > 163 | await expect(page.getByText("Loading more stories...")).toBeVisible(); | ^ 164 | 165 | await expect 166 | .poll(async () => page.locator("article").count()) at C:\Projects\trustora\tests\explore-feed-filters.spec.ts:163:61
Error Context: ..\test-results\explore-feed-filters-Story-59563--and-shows-loading-skeleton-chromium\error-context.md

testcase.name: Story 12 follow/unfollow â€º authenticated user can follow from post detail and unfollow from profile
Story 12 follow/unfollow â€º guest clicking follow sees login prompt
Story 20 full-text search â€º search matches title/body/location and keeps query in URL
Story 20 full-text search â€º sorts by relevance with reverse-chronological fallback and shows empty state
Story 20 full-text search â€º header search input submits to /search?q and page is server-rendered
Story 17 home feed â€º redirects unauthenticated visitors from / to /explore
Story 17 home feed â€º shows empty-state prompt when user follows nobody
Story 17 home feed â€º shows followed users posts in reverse chronology, supports infinite scroll, and updates on navigation
Story 5a image upload API â€º returns 401 for unauthenticated upload
Story 5a image upload API â€º uploads a valid image when authenticated
Story 5a image upload API â€º rejects unsupported file type
Story 5a image upload API â€º rejects file larger than 5 MB
Story 10 likes â€º shows like count for visitors on post cards and detail page
Story 10 likes â€º authenticated user can like and unlike with immediate count changes
Story 10 likes â€º guest clicking like sees login prompt
Story 18 location pages â€º country and city location pages are generated from posts with SEO metadata and 404 on missing locations
Story 6 post creation â€º redirects unauthenticated user from /create to /login
Story 6 post creation â€º shows inline required validations
Story 6 post creation â€º creates a post and redirects to post detail page
Story 6 post creation â€º server-side rejects more than 5 tags
Story 6 post creation â€º server-side rejects more than 10 photos
Story 6 post creation â€º rate limits post creation after 5 posts in 24 hours
Story 7 post detail page â€º allows public visitors to view canonical post detail with metadata
Story 7 post detail page â€º redirects /post/[id] and /post/[id]/wrong-slug to canonical URL with 308
Story 7 post detail page â€º photo gallery lets users browse all uploaded images
Story 9 post edit & delete â€º author sees edit and delete controls on their post
Story 9 post edit & delete â€º non-author does not see edit/delete controls
Story 9 post edit & delete â€º guest does not see edit/delete controls
Story 9 post edit & delete â€º edit form pre-populates existing fields and saves changes
Story 9 post edit & delete â€º unauthenticated user is redirected from edit page to login
Story 9 post edit & delete â€º non-author gets 403 on edit page
Story 9 post edit & delete â€º delete shows confirmation dialog and redirects after deletion
Story 21 report post and comment â€º logged-in user can report post and comment once
Story 21 report post and comment â€º guests do not see report controls
Story 19 tag pages â€º predefined tag pages are public, list matching posts in reverse chronology, and render SEO metadata
Story 19 tag pages â€º all predefined tags are accessible and invalid tags return 404
Story 13 user profile page â€º displays profile info and post grid for authenticated author
Story 13 user profile page â€º clicking a post card navigates to post detail
Story 13 user profile page â€º guest can view profile without being logged in
Story 13 user profile page â€º non-existent username returns 404
Story 13 user profile page â€º meta title and description are populated from user data
